display.purpose: Hero wordmark and page titles. Space Grotesk 700, clamp ceiling 5rem, line-height 0.95.

headline.purpose: Section headings (Just In, From the blog). Space Grotesk 700, line-height 1.1.

title.purpose: Card and list-item titles, blog post titles in listings. Space Grotesk 500.

body.purpose: Prose on about/FAQ/blog. Space Grotesk 400, line-height 1.6 (1.7 on the long-form post body). Measure 65–75ch.

label.purpose: The catalog voice — data, nav, prices, badges, metadata. JetBrains Mono, often uppercase, tracking 0.06em.

shadows.name: signal-focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Public keyboard-focus indicator; the only permitted non-flat material on the storefront.

shadows.name: admin-focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Admin keyboard-focus indicator — the same Signal ring over the admin background.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover/focus/colour transitions across public and admin surfaces.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Subtle hover/focus state transitions (nav, links, buttons, chips, rows).

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: prefers-reduced-motion collapses all transitions to near-instant (both surfaces).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-contrast inverse CTA — bone on black, Signal on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ECEDEF; color: #0A0B0D; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6B7DC9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0A0B0D, 0 0 0 3px #6B7DC9; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Hairline-bordered secondary action; the default public CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #0A0B0D; color: #ECEDEF; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid #2A2D34; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #15171B; color: #6B7DC9; border-color: #6B7DC9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0A0B0D, 0 0 0 3px #6B7DC9; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Mono text field on black with a Signal focus border.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #0A0B0D; color: #ECEDEF; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid #2A2D34; border-radius: 0; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9BA1AC; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #6B7DC9; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(107,125,201,0.25); }

components.name: Just In Badge
components.description: Signal-filled badge marking arrivals from the last 30 days.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; background: #6B7DC9; color: #0A0B0D; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 0; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Stock-page filter; selection shown by fill AND a leading glyph, never colour alone.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: transparent; color: #9BA1AC; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #2A2D34; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, border-color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-chip:hover { color: #ECEDEF; border-color: #45505f; } .ds-chip[aria-pressed="true"] { background: #6B7DC9; color: #0A0B0D; border-color: #6B7DC9; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Public mono uppercase nav; active route carries a Signal underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9BA1AC; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; margin-right: 20px; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ECEDEF; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #ECEDEF; border-bottom: 1px solid #6B7DC9; }

components.name: Admin Primary Button
components.description: Admin CTA — light-on-dark inversion (Admin Ink fill, Admin BG text), Signal on hover. The admin keeps subtle rounded corners; it is a tool, not the terminal-true storefront.
components.css: .ds-admin-btn { background: #F0F0F0; color: #111318; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-admin-btn:hover { background: #6B7DC9; } .ds-admin-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #111318, 0 0 0 3px #6B7DC9; }

components.name: Admin Input
components.description: Admin field recessed one step below its panel (Admin BG fill on an Admin Surface card), hairline border, muted placeholder, Signal focus ring. color-scheme:dark also darkens native date/time pickers and checkboxes.
components.html: <input class="ds-admin-input" type="text" placeholder="Search artist, title, description…" />
components.css: .ds-admin-input { background: #111318; color: #F0F0F0; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #2A2D35; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-admin-input::placeholder { color: #8A8F9C; } .ds-admin-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #111318, 0 0 0 3px #6B7DC9; }

components.name: Admin Nav Item
components.description: Top-bar section link in the admin chrome (Admin Surface bar). Active section sits on the Admin Raised tone; inactive items are muted and lift to raised on hover.
components.html: CatalogContentSettings
components.css: .ds-admin-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; background: #1C1F26; padding: 8px; } .ds-admin-nav__item { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #8A8F9C; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-admin-nav__item:hover { background: #242833; color: #F0F0F0; } .ds-admin-nav__item--active { background: #242833; color: #F0F0F0; }

narrative.overview: A lone antenna broadcasting underground frequencies into the dark. The canvas is pure black; the monospace voice is the teletype readout of the transmission; a single muted-indigo accent is the signal cutting through the static; and the static itself — a drifting field of genre words — is the broadcast made visible. Monochrome by doctrine: colour is delivered by record covers placed into the black, not by the interface. Inherits antenne-tilburg.nl directly and modernizes its craft without sanitizing its character. The admin is a separate surface — a darker, slightly warmer workspace (the tool, not the storefront), scoped to .admin-dark so it never touches the public site.
keyCharacteristics: Pure-black canvas; monochrome interface, colour supplied only by imagery.
JetBrains Mono as the identity/data voice; Space Grotesk for headings and reading.
Zero border-radius on the storefront — sharp, terminal-true corners.
Flat by default: depth from tonal layering and hairlines, never shadow.
One muted-indigo signal accent, used on ≤10% of any screen; shared by both surfaces.
Two signature motifs from the old site: the genre-static field and the monospace stock table.
A separate dark admin theme (.admin-dark) — a professional workspace with its own BG/Surface/Raised/Hairline/Ink tokens, distinct from the storefront.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal appears on ≤10% of any screen. It is the only hue in the interface. If a second colour is creeping in that isn't a record cover or event photo, delete it.

rules.name: The Records Bring the Colour Rule
rules.body: The interface is monochrome on purpose. All vibrancy comes from imagery placed into the black. Never tint a surface, badge, or heading to add warmth.

rules.name: The Machine-Voice Rule
rules.body: Anything that is data — a price, catalog number, label, date, opening-hours line, nav — is set in JetBrains Mono. Prose and headlines are Space Grotesk. The split is the system.

rules.name: The Flat Transmission Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only depth cue that appears in response to state is a tonal step or a Signal focus ring. If you reach for box-shadow to separate two black surfaces, add a hairline instead.

rules.name: The Two Surfaces Rule
rules.body: The public site is the storefront (the pirate signal); the admin is a separate dark workspace scoped to .admin-dark. Admin tokens (admin-bg/surface/raised/hairline/ink/ink-muted) never appear on the public surface, and the storefront canvas never appears in the admin.

rules.name: The Native-Dark Rule
rules.body: color-scheme:dark on the .admin-dark wrapper so native controls — date/time pickers, checkboxes, scrollbars — render dark. This detail is what separates a considered tool from a default Tailwind form.

dos: Do keep the canvas pure black (#0A0B0D) on every public page; let record covers be the only source of colour.
Do set all data in JetBrains Mono and all prose/headlines in Space Grotesk (the Machine-Voice Rule).
Do use zero border-radius on the storefront; corners are sharp and terminal-true.
Do separate surfaces with a 1px Hairline or a one-step tonal shift, never a shadow.
Do reserve Signal for ≤10% of a screen; at ≈5.1:1 on black it carries body links directly while staying scarce.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative, including the genre-static drift.
Do scope the admin dark theme to .admin-dark and keep its tokens off the public surface.
donts: Don't introduce a cream/sand/paper/beige body background, or any warm-neutral surface.
Don't build a generic SaaS landing page: no gradient hero, no feature-card grid, no uppercase eyebrow above every section.
Don't make it a big-box retail marketplace grid with star ratings and badges on every product.
Don't add a second interface hue, tint surfaces for warmth, or use gradient text.
Don't use border-left/border-right colour stripes, glassmorphism, or drop-shadows to fake depth on black.
Don't convey state (selected filter, sold, error) with colour alone; pair it with text, weight, or a glyph.
Don't leak storefront tokens into the admin or admin tokens into the storefront; the two surfaces stay distinct.
